selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 岛, 岛屿, 孤立地区, 安全岛；vt. 使成岛状, 孤立
words.definition: n. a land mass (smaller than a continent) that is surrounded by water

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: n. 现在, 礼品, 瞄准；a. 现在的, 出席的
words.definition: n. the period of time that is happening now; any continuous stretch of time including the moment of speech

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: n. 湖, 池, 色淀；v. (使)血球溶解
words.definition: n. a body of (usually fresh) water surrounded by land

words.translation: n. 集合, 聚集；vi. 聚集, 集合, 渐增
words.definition: n. sewing consisting of small folds or puckers made by pulling tight a thread in a line of stitching

words.translation: n. 石头, 宝石, 果核, 纪念碑, 结石；vt. 投扔石子, 铺石头
words.definition: n. building material consisting of a piece of rock hewn in a definite shape for a special purpose

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展
words.definition: v. become larger, greater, or bigger; expand or gain

words.translation: n. 兴趣, 嗜好, 利息, 利益, 爱好, 趣味, 势力；vt. 使感兴趣, 与...有关系
words.definition: n. a sense of concern with and curiosity about someone or something

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 步骤, 步, 步幅, 脚步声, 踏级, 步伐, 短距离, 步态, 手段, 等级；vt. 踏, 以步测量, 跨步, 使成阶梯状
words.definition: n. the act of changing location by raising the foot and setting it down

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: n. 关闭；vt. 关上, 闭起, 幽禁, 合拢, 轧住
words.definition: a. not open

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: n. 边缘, 尖锐, 刀刃, 优势；vt. 使锐利, 挤进, 镶边
words.definition: n. the boundary of a surface

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 厨房, 全套炊具
words.definition: n. a room equipped for preparing meals

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
words.definition: n a message that tells the particulars of an act or occurrence or course of events; presented in writing or drama or cinema or as a radio or television program

words.translation: n. 答案, 回答, 回报, 答辩；vt. 回答, 反驳, 适应, 响应, 符合
words.definition: n. a statement (either spoken or written) that is made to reply to a question or request or criticism or accusation

words.translation: n. 兄弟
words.definition: n. a male with the same parents as someone else

words.translation: n. 驾车, 快车道, 推进力, 驱动, 动力, 击球, 驱动器；vt. 开车, 驱使, 推动, 驾驶
words.definition: n. the act of applying force to propel something

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达
words.definition: n. the land on which real estate is located

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的
words.definition: n. a meeting at which a number of athletic contests are held

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: vi. 说, 说话, 演说, 发言；vt. 说, 讲, 说出
words.definition: v. use language

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: s. mentally and emotionally stable

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. a member of the Caucasoid race

words.translation: n. 环, 环形物, 拳击场, 戒指, 角逐, 小集团, 铃声, 钟声, 声调；vt. 包围, 套住, 按铃, 敲钟
words.definition: n. a characteristic sound

words.translation: n. 好感, 偏爱, 喜爱, 相信, 庇护, 赞同, 支持, 信赖, 善行, 恩惠, 徽章, 礼物；vt. 赞成, 帮助, 支持, 喜爱, 偏袒, 关切, 赐与, 给与, 有利于, 有助于, 像, 体恤
words.definition: n a feeling of favorable regard

words.translation: num. 四十, 四十个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the product of ten and four

words.translation: num. 六, 六个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of five and one

words.translation: n. 注意, 注意力
words.definition: n. the process whereby a person concentrates on some features of the environment to the (relative) exclusion of others

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: n. 蛋, 卵；vt. 挑唆, 煽动, 调蛋黄
words.definition: n. animal reproductive body consisting of an ovum or embryo together with nutritive and protective envelopes; especially the thin-shelled reproductive body laid

words.translation: n. 傍晚, 晚间, 末期
words.definition: n. the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)

words.translation: a. 平坦的, 单调的, 无力的, 浅的, 萧条的, 干脆的, 无聊的；adv. 平直地, 断然地

words.translation: n. 水果, 果类, 结果

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃

words.translation: n. 钥匙, 键, 解答, 关键, 要害, 基调, 线索, 答案, 暗礁；vt. 调音, 锁上, 提供线索

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 岩石, 岩礁, 石头, 基石, 暗礁, 摇动, 摇滚乐；vt. 摇摆, 摇动, 使摇晃, 使动摇
words.definition: n. a lump or mass of hard consolidated mineral matter

words.translation: n. 星期六
words.definition: n. the seventh and last day of the week; observed as the Sabbath by Jews and some Christians

words.translation: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
words.definition: n. a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止

words.translation: n. 烟, 雾气, 烟熏剂, 抽烟, 烟色；vi. 吸烟, 冒烟, 弥漫

words.translation: n. 传播, 散布, 伸展；a. 双唇展开的, 伸展的

words.translation: vt. 投, 掷, 抛, 发射, 摔下, 匆匆穿上(或脱下), 抛弃, 摆脱；vi. 丢, 掷, 抛

words.translation: n. 触觉, 碰, 触, 机灵, 轻触, 格调, 少许, 缺点, 弹力；vt. 接触, 触摸, 触及, 使接触, 达到, 涉及, 影响到, 使轻度受害, 感动
words.definition: n. the event of something coming in contact with the body

words.translation: pron. 无论什么
words.definition: s one or some or every or all without specification

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: n. 咬, 一口；v. 咬, 刺痛, 穿透

words.translation: n. 力, 体力, 力量, 势力, 动力, 权力, 强国, 乘方, 强度, 幂, 功率；vt. 使...有力量, 供以动力, 激励

words.translation: n. 全体人员, 工作班子, 棍棒, 杆, 拐杖, 支柱, 权杖；a. 职员的, 雇员的, 参谋的

words.translation: n. 苹果, 家伙

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶

words.translation: n. 外套；vt. 外面覆盖, 给...穿外套
words.definition: n. an outer garment that has sleeves and covers the body from shoulder down; worn outdoors

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘

words.translation: n. 叶, 树叶, 花瓣, 页；vi. 生叶, 翻书页
words.definition: n. the main organ of photosynthesis and transpiration in higher plants

words.translation: a. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地
words.definition: a. characterized by or producing sound of great volume or intensity

words.translation: n. 脖子, 衣领, 颈；vi. 拥抱, 拥吻, 收缩
words.definition: n. the part of an organism (human or animal) that connects the head to the rest of the body

words.translation: n. 噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹；vt. 谣传
words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: n. 猫头鹰

words.translation: n. 口袋, 钱袋, 钱, 容器；vt. 装...在口袋里, 隐藏, 抑制, 私吞, 搁置, 击...入袋

words.translation: n. 匆促, 冲进, 急流, 灯心草；vi. 冲, 奔, 闯, 赶紧, 匆促行事, 涌现

words.translation: n. 帆, 篷, 帆船, 航程, 帆状物；vi. 航行, 启航, 张帆而行

words.translation: n. 呼喊, 喊声；vi. 呼喊, 喊叫, 嚷
words.definition: v. utter in a loud voice; talk in a loud voice (usually denoting characteristic manner of speaking)

words.translation: n. 印, 邮票, 打印器, 戳子, 图章, 印花税票, 标志, 特征, 类型, 跺脚；vt. 盖章于, 顿足, 贴上邮票, 铭刻, 捣碎, 扑灭
words.definition: n. a type or class

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映

words.translation: n. 尊敬, 尊重, 问候；vt. 尊敬, 注意, 遵守

words.translation: n. 赛跑, 流出, 运转；a. 流动的, 跑着的, 连续的
words.definition: n. the state of being in operation

words.translation: num. 七, 七个

words.translation: n. 皮肤, 皮；vt. 剥皮, 在...植皮
words.definition: n. a natural protective body covering and site of the sense of touch

words.translation: adv. 突然, 意外, 忽然, 迅速, 即席作成, 即刻, 急速

words.translation: n. 荒野, 荒地；a. 野性的, 野蛮的, 野生的, 失控的, 任性的, 杂乱的, 轻率的, 狂热的, 疯狂的

words.translation: n. 针, 尖；vt. 用针缝

words.translation: n. 坚果, 核心, 螺帽
words.definition: n. usually large hard-shelled seed

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇

words.translation: n. 阵雨, 淋浴, 一阵, 展出者, 显示者；vi. 淋浴, 下阵雨
words.definition: n. a plumbing fixture that sprays water over you
